isi.driveFileNames: Sookyung Jun - 환절기 (In Between Changes) (feat. Jaebin).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric Sookyung Jun - 환절기 (In Between Changes) (feat. Jaebin)

Romanization

gyejeorui kkeuteseo yeollin
seorap sogeseo
otjang sogeseo
tteoreojin tuk bit baraen yeongsujeung gateun gieok
oraen nareul bulleonae

hanado namji anatji
geuriul geotdo
oeroul geotdo
geureonde wae tto gamgicheoreom alge doeneunji neol
myeonyeogi an dwae
ajik nan

kkok uriga anirado
nae siganeun dareul geot eopsi
heulleoganeunde

geunarui barameun
gieoi dorawa
gyeolguk nae
georeumeul meomchunda

yagiradeon siganeul samkyeodo
mudyeojiji anneun ge isseo
apeun geotdo anin
miun geotdo anin
nalssi gateun gieokdeul

geuriun geon geu narui neoinji
eoryeotdeon geu ttaeui nainji
wae inji nal jeombu
naeeojuge doeneun
nega itdeon gyejeorui teum

yagiradeon siganeul samkyeodo
mudyeojiji anneun ge isseo
apeun geotdo anin
miun geotdo anin
nalssi gateun gieokdeul

geuriun geon geu narui neoinji
eoryeotdeon geu ttaeui nainji
wae inji nal jeombu
naeeojuge doeneun
nega itdeon gyejeorui teum

gakja dareun gose seoseo
gakja dareun pyojeongeul jitgo
gyejeoreun ogado

imamttaemyeon eogimeopsi
natji anneun chueogi isseo
kkok ireon barame
sireo bonaeeotdeon
sijeorui han jogakdeul

danjeonghi kkiwodun chaekgalpi
nado mollae pyeolchyeo bodeusi
gamanhi nal jeombu
naeryeonoge doeneun
nega itdeon gyejeorui teum

Hangeul

계절의 끝에서 열린
서랍 속에서
옷장 속에서
떨어진 툭 빛 바랜 영수증 같은 기억
오랜 날을 불러내

하나도 남지 않았지
그리울 것도
외로울 것도
그런데 왜 또 감기처럼 앓게 되는지 널
면역이 안 돼
아직 난

꼭 우리가 아니라도
내 시간은 다를 것 없이
흘러가는데

그날의 바람은
기어이 돌아와
결국 내
걸음을 멈춘다

약이라던 시간을 삼켜도
무뎌지지 않는 게 있어
아픈 것도 아닌
미운 것도 아닌
날씨 같은 기억들

그리운 건 그 날의 너인지
어렸던 그 때의 나인지
왜 인지 날 전부
내어주게 되는
네가 있던 계절의 틈

약이라던 시간을 삼켜도
무뎌지지 않는 게 있어
아픈 것도 아닌
미운 것도 아닌
날씨 같은 기억들

그리운 건 그 날의 너인지
어렸던 그 때의 나인지
왜 인지 날 전부
내어주게 되는
네가 있던 계절의 틈

각자 다른 곳에 서서
각자 다른 표정을 짓고
계절은 오가도

이맘때면 어김없이
낫지 않는 추억이 있어
꼭 이런 바람에
실어 보내었던
시절의 한 조각들

단정히 끼워둔 책갈피
나도 몰래 펼쳐 보듯이
가만히 날 전부
내려놓게 되는
네가 있던 계절의 틈

isi.lyrics:
Lyric KIRI - orange caramel

Romanization

I see the twilight
on your lips
tangerine smoke
in my room
amber falling slow
over you
every night pours honey on me, ah~~

I can feel the glow
dalkomhaetdeon
you fell like rain
seumyeodeuldeon
jamdeun bulbit arae
neorwihan all night
nuntteumyeon beonjideon low tide
call me all night
all night, ha~~

orange caramel
under velvet nights
through my soul
you glow in tangerine
areumdawojineun bam
naneun neoreul
meomchul suga eopseo
all I know, you still flow
heureudeon

I can see the light
on your skin
tangerine rain
in my veins
amber falling slow
over me
every night amber in my dreams, ah~~

I can see the light
sweet tangerine
you came like rain
jisaedeon bam
hanadulssik
noganaerin neol wihan all night
I drift with no name
in the silence
heullin nummuldeuldo
modu sarajyeo

orange caramel
under velvet nights
through my soul
you glow in tangerine
areumdawojineun bam
naneun neoreul
meomchul suga eopseo
all I know, you still flow
heureudeon

Hangeul

I see the twilight
on your lips
tangerine smoke
in my room
amber falling slow
over you
every night pours honey on me, ah~~

I can feel the glow
달콤했던
you fell like rain
스며들던
잠든 불빛 아래
널위한 all night
눈뜨면 번지던 low tide
call me all night
all night, ha~~

orange caramel
under velvet nights
through my soul
you glow in tangerine
아름다워지는 밤
나는 너를
멈출 수가 없어
all I know, you still flow
흐르던

I can see the light
on your skin
tangerine rain
in my veins
amber falling slow
over me
every night amber in my dreams, ah~~

I can see the light
sweet tangerine
you came like rain
지새던 밤
하나둘씩
녹아내린 널 위한 all night
I drift with no name
in the silence
흘린 눈물들도
모두 사라져

orange caramel
under velvet nights
through my soul
you glow in tangerine
아름다워지는 밤
나는 너를
멈출 수가 없어
all I know, you still flow
흐르던

isi.lyrics:
Lyric YEIN - Come

Romanization

What can I make you here,
In this twisted scene?
You may say I am lost,
But you don’t see the fight

Don’t you dare
Don’t be a fool
I’ll take a shot

It can’t be real
You must be thinking I’m a fucking lunatic
It can’t be real
You must be thinking I’m a fucking hysteric
It can’t be real
You must be thinking I’m a fucking lunatic
It can’t be real
You must be thinking I’m a fucking hysteric

Baby I can sing another song
Lead me there
Draw me a map to the truth

What is your game tonight
In this shady place?
You might think I am blind
But you don’t see the chase

Don’t you dare
Don’t be a fool
I’ll take a shot

It can’t be real
You must be thinking I’m a fucking lunatic
It can’t be real
You must be thinking I’m a fucking hysteric
It can’t be real
You must be thinking I’m a fucking lunatic
It can’t be real
You must be thinking I’m a fucking hysteric

Sit back and think
Think what it means
The way things are going for me
Is not how I wanted to be
Stuck in a maze
lost in the game
I hold on tight
It’s not how I wanted to be

Sit back and think
Think what it means
The way things are going for me
Is not how I wanted to be
Stuck in a maze
lost in the game
I hold on tight
It’s not how I wanted to be
